heading: Administration absent State agreement
label: 2312 Administration absent State agreement
notes: Termination DateNo trade adjustment assistance, vouchers, allowances, or other payments or benefits may be provided under this part after , except as otherwise provided, see , as modified by , set out as notes preceding .June 30, 2022section 285 of Pub. L. 93–618section 406(a)(7) of Pub. L. 114–27section 2271 of this title

children.heading: Promulgation of regulations; fair hearing
children.label: a Promulgation of regulations; fair hearing
children.text: In any State where there is no agreement in force between a State or its agency under , the Secretary shall arrange under regulations prescribed by him for performance of all necessary functions under subpart B of this part, including provision for a fair hearing for any worker whose application for payments is denied.section 2311 of this title

children.heading: Review of final determination
children.label: b Review of final determination
children.text: A final determination under subsection (a) with respect to entitlement to program benefits under subpart B of this part is subject to review by the courts in the same manner and to the same extent as is provided by .section 405(g) of title 42
